svg.title: DCCT-NSGA-III optimisation pipeline
svg.desc: Phase 3 MILP feeds primal and dual outputs into two parallel seeding channels — CAPS and SPRD — whose outputs merge into Phase 4 DCCT-NSGA-III, producing a certificate-anchored Pareto front. Three theorems on the right annotate guarantees.
svg.text: M=4, N=84, G=80 · CRI reliability obj.
